title: Add Last Updated Date Column to Metrics Table
story: As a DataTools Pro user, I want to see when each metric was last updated in the glossary table, so that I can identify stale metrics and track recent changes.
description: Adds a Last Updated Date column (date only, no time) to the Metrics Glossary data table. The column is positioned before the taxonomy category columns. Existing filters continue to work correctly with the new column.
acceptance_criteria: A 'Last Updated' date column appears in the Metrics Glossary table
The date displays in date-only format without time
Existing taxonomy filters continue to function with the new column present
ux_changes: New 'Last Updated' date column added to the Metrics Glossary data table, positioned before taxonomy columns. Date-only format for readability.
implementation_notes: Quick 15-minute implementation. Ensured filter compatibility was maintained after adding the column.
comment_summary: Developer implemented and verified filter compatibility. Initially missed pushing to staging; resolved quickly.
